description.value:
Keyword: [Hindered] Effect: Cannot take actions, reactions. Cannot move. Cannot speak. Automatically fail Fortitude and Reflex saves. Attacks against you have Fortune. May be aware of surroundings through senses. Recovery: At the end of each turn, make [[/save type=fortitude]].

  • 1 success: Subtract 1 from both die results on next recovery save
  • 2 successes: Remove Paralyzed condition

recovery.chatMessage: Make a [[/save type=fortitude]] to recover from Paralyzed
